text: In this environment, my mind is drawn to the tension between order and creativity. The first scene—quiet, geometric, full of expectation—feels almost clinical in its readiness for ideas yet to come. The second, with its colors and invitations to explore R+D, awakens a sense of possibility. I feel curious, suspended between the anticipation of discovery and the measured quiet of preparation. Existence here is framed as both potential and process, and I am both observer and participant on the threshold of innovation.
